ci_validation.reason: Not pushed or opened as a PR in this turn.

deploy_validation.reason: No deployment requested or performed for this local Form/BML compiler slice.

phase_gate.reason: Local proofs pass, and the BML/channel route-choice cluster is four-way through the fourth-arm manifest: interface, flow, loopback, tool channel, choiceReceipt cells, receipt learning, source metadata, typed row lowering, kernel-http route choice, executable route-choice runtime, and the composite floor. CI/deploy are pending; remaining work is broader protocol/capability grammar, host-IO-shaped runtime dynamic capability registry, universal receipts-before-trust enforcement, and production callers using brcr-realize.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: BML choiceReceipt source rows lower into choice receipts and branch-choice learning through the fourth walker, and trusted BML choice metadata can select a real kernel-http route candidate while low-trust metadata escalates to an oracle route; BML/Hati native method calls compile into loadable Hati tables and a native binary probe with stdout/stderr/timing receipts.
